title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
summary: Mary Lennox discovers a hidden walled garden on her uncle's estate and helps bring it back to life, transforming herself and the people around her in the process.
authorBio: Frances Hodgson Burnett (1849-1924) was a British-American novelist and playwright best known for children's classics including The Secret Garden and A Little Princess.
publicDomainNotes: Published in 1911 and in the public domain in the United States.

title: War and Peace
author: Leo Tolstoy
summary: Tolstoy traces aristocratic Russian families through love, war, and social upheaval during the Napoleonic era.
authorBio: Leo Tolstoy (1828-1910) was a Russian novelist and thinker whose work transformed world literature.
publicDomainNotes: Published in 1869 and in the public domain in the United States.
